overview.title: Access Control Overview
overview.description: Review the overall state of system accounts, roles, permissions, and assignments.

stats.totalPermissionsDescription: System and plugin permission points combined

status.title: Status Summary
status.subtitle: Focus on account assignment, role maintenance, and builtin constraints.
status.customRolesDescription: {empty} of them still have no permissions
status.builtinRolesDescription: Protect the system baseline and keep critical fields constrained

risk.title: Risks and Follow-up
risk.subtitle: Review unassigned users, empty roles, and builtin-role constraints first.
risk.emptyDescription: Role and permission history can be shown after audit logs are added.
risk.defaultDescription: This item still needs an administrator review.
risk.builtinNoticeDescription: Builtin roles cannot be deleted and some fields stay read-only

quickLinks.subtitle: Jump directly into the core access control management pages.

todo.subtitle: Keep the overview lightweight instead of turning it into a report page.
todo.emptyDescription: There are no extra access control follow-ups right now.

state.loadFailedDescription: Retry loading user, role, and permission statistics.
